text.title: integration-testing Output Contract
text.summary: Required test directory layout and fixture invariants.

section.title: JSON Schema

example.note: Session-scoped container, function-scoped tx, DI override + clear, status + body asserts.
Three violations: unpinned tag (r3), per-test container (r7), teardown deletion (r2), status-only assert (r9).

list.item: tests/unit/ and tests/integration/ are separate directories.
conftest uses scope="session" for the container, scope="function" for the session.
Per-test fixture begins a transaction and rolls back on yield exit.
DI overrides cleared via app.dependency_overrides.clear() after each test.
Every test asserts both HTTP status and body shape.
CI suite runtime < 5 minutes (track in PR descriptions).
